EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IDynamicSurface2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members that utilize Terrain surfaces.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D7DE4992-54F7-4F46-8310-C9D991937C3C")]
public interface IDynamicSurface2 : IDynamicSurface

Properties

CanDoCurvature

Indicates if earth curvature can be applied.

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

MinimizeResourceUsage

Indicates whether or not resource uasge should be minimized.

bool MinimizeResourceUsage { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
